module.name: agent
module.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt orchestration. It re-exports Prompt and InitialPrompt, provides task runtime APIs including the implemented Task::preview TaskPreview interface, routes initial model steps through InitialPrompt with cloned task/tool session context while non-initial model steps keep the task name prompt fallback, and sends DeepSeek chat prompts using the provider-supported user role.

childModules.name: model
childModules.purpose: Owns agent model backend traits, request/response data, backend errors, and the implemented Deepseek streaming backend. DeepseekBackend loads its config and issues streaming Deepseek chat-completions requests with a provider-supported user-role single-message payload preserving request.prompt as content.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Defines the agent prompt interface and InitialPrompt template renderer; Context is built from previous task previews as request/result lines while tool previews are rendered separately through {{#Tools}}.

childModules.name: session
childModules.purpose: Owns Session startup/routing behavior, SessionState storage with shared Arc<StdMutex<SessionContext>>, host-preview bootstrap via ExecutionSignature::new preview queries, Preview tool storage, and task creation that passes the shared session context into Task::new.

childModules.name: task
childModules.purpose: Owns the implemented task runtime, including Task::preview producing a TaskPreview request from the task signature name with an empty result placeholder and initial model-step prompt rendering through InitialPrompt from cloned task/tool session context.
